landing.heroDesc: The all-in-one platform connecting brands and creators across Kazakhstan.
landing.heroTitle: Where creators and brands collaborate beautifully.
landing.heroSubtitle: An editorial marketplace built for Kazakhstan. Creators curate collections, brands discover their next collaboration — no noise, no middlemen.
landing.featuresTitle: Built for taste, not for volume.
landing.featureCurationBody: Every creator publishes a magazine-quality collection of products they actually use and love.
landing.featureDiscoveryBody: Filter by city, category and audience size. Find the creator who matches your brand voice.
landing.featureDirectBody: Brands contact creators directly. No agencies, no intermediaries, no commissions.
landing.howStep1Body: Sign up as a creator or brand. Onboard in under two minutes.
landing.howStep2Body: Creators publish collections. Brands browse the directory.
landing.howStep3Body: Brands send a request. Creators accept and start working together.
landing.creatorBenefit1: A mini personal website for your audience.
landing.creatorBenefit2: Get discovered by brands actively looking for you.
landing.creatorBenefit3: Own your inbox — every brand request lands in your dashboard.
landing.brandBenefit1: Filter by city, category, and audience size.
landing.brandBenefit2: Save creators and build your shortlist.
landing.brandBenefit3: Send briefs in seconds — no agency markup.
landing.faqA1: Yes. Creators can build a full profile and publish collections at no cost.
landing.faqA2: Brands send a request through your profile. It arrives in your dashboard with budget and a message.
landing.faqA3: No. We don't touch the deal. You negotiate and deliver directly.
landing.faqA4: Almaty, Astana, Shymkent and Aktau today. More coming.
landing.faqQ5: What are the differences between Free and Creator Pro?
landing.faqA5: Free creators can create up to 3 collections and 15 products. Creator Pro unlocks unlimited collections, unlimited products, priority search placement, a PRO badge, and profile analytics — all for 3 900 ₸/month.
landing.faqQ6: Is there a plan for brands?
landing.faqA6: Yes. The Brand plan at 9 900 ₸/month gives you unlimited creator search, advanced filters, saved creator lists, unlimited collaboration requests, and campaign management tools.
landing.footerTagline: An editorial marketplace for Kazakhstan creators.
landing.metaDesc: Discover Kazakhstan's top creators. Browse curated collections, shop products, and start collaborations.
landing.trustVerified: ✅ Verified creator profiles with real stats
landing.trustFast: ⚡ Quick start — create a deal in 2 minutes

terms.metaDesc: Terms of Service for the Collabrandly platform.
terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.section1Body: These Terms of Service ("Terms") govern the relationship between the owner of the Collabrandly platform ("Platform") and the user ("User"). By using the Platform, the User confirms they have read and agree to these Terms.
terms.section2Body: To access the full functionality of the Platform, the User must register by providing accurate and up-to-date information. The User is solely responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of their account credentials.
terms.section3Body: The User may use the Platform services in accordance with their intended purpose and post content that complies with applicable laws. The User agrees not to spam, post misleading information, or infringe on third-party copyrights.
terms.section4Body: The Platform is provided "as is" without any warranties. The Platform is not liable for damages arising from the use or inability to use its services. The User bears full responsibility for their content.
terms.section5Body: The Platform protects User personal data in accordance with the Privacy Policy and applicable data protection laws. The User consents to the processing of their personal data.
terms.section6Body: The Platform reserves the right to modify these Terms at any time. The current version is always available at https://creator-kz.kz/terms. Continued use after changes constitutes acceptance of the new Terms.

privacy.metaDesc: Privacy Policy for the Collabrandly platform.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.section1Body: When registering and using the Platform, we may collect: name, email address, phone number, and other contact information. For creators and brands, we additionally collect professional information: category, city, social media links, portfolio.
privacy.section2Body: Collected data is used to provide and improve Platform services, personalize content, process applications, provide technical support, and analytics.
privacy.section3Body: The Platform does not sell User personal data to third parties. Data may be shared only with User consent or as required by law.
privacy.section4Body: We implement organizational and technical measures to protect personal data from unauthorized access, alteration, or destruction.
privacy.section5Body: Users have the right to access, correct, or delete their personal data, and to withdraw consent for data processing at any time.
privacy.section6Body: For any questions, contact us at hello@creator-kz.kz. We will respond to all requests within 30 calendar days.
